name: @kwirthmagnify/kwirth-external
description: An external option for deploying Kwirth on a server (not inside Kubernetes) for running as a proxy or server access (for Backstage, for instance)

scripts.clean: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.mkdirSync('dist/front', { recursive: true });"
scripts.copy-bundle: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const s = fs.readFileSync('shebang.txt', 'utf8'); const b = fs.readFileSync('./bundle/bundle.js'); fs.writeFileSync('dist/bundle.js', Buffer.concat([Buffer.from(s), b]));"
scripts.copy-front: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.cpSync('./bundle/front', './dist/front', { recursive: true });"
scripts.dist: npm run clean && npm run copy-bundle && npm run copy-front && npm run copy-main && npm run copy-version
